description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: In the short term prior to

's implementation of the Allocation System Primitive, Keel may invest idle funds in low-risk decentralized finance opportunities, including providing liquidity to established lending protocols on Solana. These deployments will be subject to the approval of Operational GovOps.
